ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the ticket (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the ticket */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone associated with the ticket, if any */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the ticket */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the ticket (e.g., over 1 year old, 11 months old) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ticket */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the ticket (e.g., technical, non-technical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ticket was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES ticket_states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., support technician, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the comment is internal or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., image, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the history entry is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., state change, assignment change) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_tags_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the report is associated with */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_reports_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)
